title: 8× RTX 3090 — 192GB Big-MoE Inference Server
subtitle: 192GB VRAM · 2× EPYC 7543 Zen3 · 1TB DDR4-3200 (16-ch ~400 GB/s) · Supermicro AS-4124GS-TNR · every GPU PCIe 4.0 x16 · prices a 2026-06-26 snapshot — edit / autofill to refresh

rows.name: Chassis / mobo
rows.spec: Supermicro AS-4124GS-TNR 4U dual-socket GPU server (barebones, refurb). 8× PCIe 4.0 x16 GPU slots via PLX.

rows.name: RAM (per 64GB)
rows.spec: 64GB DDR4-3200 ECC RDIMM ×16 = 1TB @ 1 DIMM/channel (full 3200, 16 slots free for a future 2TB).

rows.name: NVMe
rows.spec: 2TB U.2 NVMe PCIe SSD (use NVMe, not SATA — fast model loads).

rows.name: GPU (each)
rows.spec: RTX 3090 24GB, BLOWER-style ×8 (correct for 4U front-to-rear airflow; loud). $850 = a found deal; June-2026 used market ~$1,050.
